title: Apology of Hattusili III
description: The first known royal autobiography — a king justifies his usurpation.
introduction: The first known royal autobiography — a king justifies his usurpation.

translation.text: Thus speaks Hattusili, the Great King. I will declare the divine providence of Ishtar. My goddess sent my father a dream: 'For Hattusili the years are short. Give him to me. Let him be my priest and he will live.'
